title: Corpse x Cosmetic Armor Reworked Compat
description: This little mod allows you to directly equip your Cosmetic Armor items to the respective slots
body:
Corpse x Cosmetic Armor Reworked Compat
This little mod allows you to directly equip your Cosmetic Armor items to the respective slots
Support is available on \[Discord\]([https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9))
